title: Capture config
description: Regression-snapshot config for scripts/capture_snapshot.py. Mirrors CaptureConfig in scripts/pbi_capture/config.py; that module's validate_capture remains the authority for cross-field rules JSON Schema can't express (test id uniqueness, context-in-group_by_columns).

output_dir.description: Where outputs are written. Default output/regression.

connection.description: Leave empty to auto-discover the local msmdsrv instance.

max_rows_per_context.description: Capture hard-rejects any non-zero value: a TOPN row cap silently truncates dimension combinations and is unstable across runs. Row caps are a benchmark-only knob.

memory_threshold_pct.description: Memory-watchdog trip point, as a % of actual total RAM. Default 80.0. Set 0 to disable.

skip_on_smoke_failure.description: Skip measures that fail the smoke test. Default true.

diagnostic_mode.description: Run only the first 8 tests. Default false.

model_name.description: Written into the snapshot header; used as the report title by compare-snapshots.py.

global_filters.description: DAX boolean expressions, each applied as KEEPFILTERS inside a CALCULATE around the measure.

tests.description: Test cases. Each test.id must be unique — uniqueness is enforced by validate_capture, not this schema.

measure.description: Bare measure name — no brackets. The engine adds [..] itself.

context.description: "grand_total" or a key present in group_by_columns (validated by validate_capture).

group_by_columns.description: Context name -> DAX column(s). A single 'Table'[Column], or |-separated columns for a cross-product.
